diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -21,11 +21,15 @@
 

     test_x_norm = (test_x - train_mean[np.newaxis, np.newaxis, :]) / train_std[np.newaxis, np.newaxis, :]

 

-    # Model architecture must match checkpoint; read hyperparams if saved

-    model_kwargs = checkpoint.get('model_kwargs', {

-        'num_nodes': 207, 'in_steps': 12, 'out_steps': 12, 'adj_mx': adj_mx,

-        'hidden_channels': 64, 'spatial_channels': 32, 'num_blocks': 3, 'dropout': 0.1

-    })

+    # Load model kwargs, ensure adj_mx is present

+    model_kwargs = checkpoint.get('model_kwargs', {})

+    if 'adj_mx' not in model_kwargs:

+        model_kwargs['adj_mx'] = adj_mx

+    # Provide defaults for essential args if missing

+    model_kwargs.setdefault('num_nodes', 207)

+    model_kwargs.setdefault('in_steps', 12)

+    model_kwargs.setdefault('out_steps', 12)

+

     model = STGCN(**model_kwargs)

     model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -106,10 +106,12 @@
 

         scheduler.step(val_mae)

 

+        # Model kwargs now include adj_mx to allow reconstruction by predict.py

         model_kwargs = {

             'num_nodes': num_nodes, 'in_steps': 12, 'out_steps': 12,

             'hidden_channels': args.hidden_channels, 'spatial_channels': args.spatial_channels,

-            'num_blocks': args.num_blocks, 'dropout': args.dropout

+            'num_blocks': args.num_blocks, 'dropout': args.dropout,

+            'adj_mx': adj_mx,

         }

         checkpoint = {

             'epoch': epoch,

@@ -124,9 +126,11 @@
         if val_mae < best_val_loss:

             best_val_loss = val_mae

             torch.save(checkpoint, os.path.join(args.checkpoint_dir, 'best.pt'))

-        print(f'Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.epochs}, Val MAE (norm): {val_mae:.6f}, Best: {best_val_loss:.6f}')

+

+        print(f"Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.epochs}, Val MAE (norm): {val_mae:.6f}, Best: {best_val_loss:.6f}")

+

     elapsed = time.time() - start_time

-    print(f'Training done in {elapsed:.1f}s, best val loss: {best_val_loss:.6f}')

+    print(f"Training done in {elapsed:.1f}s, best val loss: {best_val_loss:.6f}")

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':

     main()
